race.comment: STAR CASINO (1) needed the run fresh when plodding away into midfield in what has proven a strong race. Better for that and is better suited over this sought of trip and the inside draw another bonus. Bold showing anticipated. CUBAN LORD (6) got things back on track last time when sent forward at Gawler, only to be reeled in late. Drops back in trip but if they look to replicate tactics, she can go a couple better. MUFFLA (10) is yet to strike through this campaign but has been thereabouts and should be hitting his straps on the quick back-up. Reunites with winning hoop and is among the main hopes. CULLEN SKINK (3) was doing his best work late here two days ago and will appreciate the longer journey on the quick back-up.
